productCategory.description: the product category label printed in the product/packing header (e.g. 'powder detergent')

items.description: one entry per row of the packing/carton specification table

productPacking.description: the product/packing label exactly as printed including pack count and unit size (e.g. 'Brand 12 X 1kg')

cartonsPer20ft.description: number of cartons that fit in a 20 foot container

cartonsPer40ft.description: number of cartons that fit in a 40 foot container

cartonDimensionCm.description: carton dimension in cm as printed in length x width x height form (e.g. '40.00 X 25.00 X 30.00')

netWeightKg.description: net weight per carton in kg (kg/ltr column)

grossWeightKg.description: gross weight per carton in kg
